name: postgres-explorer
description: PostgreSQL database explorer for VS Code with notebook support

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the PostgreSQL server

port.description: Port number of the PostgreSQL server

environment.description: Environment tag for safety warnings and visual indicators

readOnlyMode.description: Force read-only transactions for this connection

postgresExplorer.aiProvider.description: AI Provider to use for query assistance

postgresExplorer.aiApiKey.description: API Key for direct AI providers (OpenAI/Anthropic)

postgresExplorer.aiModel.description: Model name (e.g., gpt-4, claude-3-opus). Leave empty for defaults.

postgresExplorer.streaming.enabled.description: Enable cursor-based streaming for large result sets

postgresExplorer.streaming.batchSize.description: Number of rows per batch when streaming results

postgresExplorer.queryTimeout.description: Global query timeout in milliseconds (0 for no timeout). Can be overridden per connection.

postgresExplorer.performance.slowQueryTh.description: Threshold in milliseconds to flag slow queries in history and results.

postgresExplorer.performance.defaultLimi.description: Default row limit for SELECT queries when auto-LIMIT is enabled.

postgresExplorer.query.autoLimitEnabled.description: Automatically append LIMIT clause to SELECT queries that don't have one. Always enabled in read-only mode.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run esbuild-base -- --minify && npm run esbuild-renderer -- --minify
scripts.compile: tsc -p ./ && npm run esbuild-renderer && npm run copy-templates
scripts.esbuild: npm run esbuild-base -- --sourcemap && npm run esbuild-renderer -- --sourcemap
scripts.esbuild-watch: npm run esbuild-base -- --sourcemap --watch & npm run esbuild-renderer -- --sourcemap --watch
scripts.test: npm run compile && mocha --loader ./node_modules/ts-node/esm/transpile-only.mjs -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:integration: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/integration/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:renderer: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/RendererComponents.test.ts'
scripts.test:renderer:coverage: npm run compile && nyc ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/RendererComponents.test.ts'
scripts.test:versions: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/integration/ConnectionLifecycle.test.ts'
scripts.test:all: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.coverage: npm run compile && npm run build-tests && nyc mocha -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ./out_test/setup.js 'out_test/**/*.test.js'
